FC Barcelona defeated Real Madrid 4-1 at the Santiago Bernabeu in a dominant El Clasico performance. Robert Lewandowski scored twice in the first half, while Lamine Yamal added a spectacular solo goal in the 67th minute. Pedri completed the rout with a curling strike from 25 yards. For Real Madrid, Jude Bellingham scored a consolation penalty in stoppage time. Barcelona manager Hansi Flick called it "the best performance of the season." The result moves Barcelona five points clear at the top of La Liga, with Atletico Madrid and Girona in pursuit.
